## What Problem Does This Solve?

Describe the user or operator problem. Ground the request in mission-native work, not generic chat behavior.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful implementation that would solve the problem while keeping Narthynx local-first, durable, approval-gated, and replayable.

## Does It Preserve Mission-Runtime Identity?

Explain how this proposal preserves Narthynx as a Mission Agent OS with missions, graphs, checkpoints, approvals, artifacts, and replay.

## Safety And Scope Notes

List any safety implications, policy changes, approval needs, or post-MVP integrations involved.
